allow: PowerShell(Get-Command node -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Get-Command npm -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; [System.Environment]::GetEnvironmentVariable\("PATH", "Machine"\) -split ";" | Where-Object { $_ -match "node" })

PowerShell(Get-ChildItem "C:\\Program Files\\nodejs\\node.exe" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Get-ChildItem "$env:APPDATA\\npm\\node.exe" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; where.exe node 2>$null; [System.Environment]::GetEnvironmentVariable\("PATH","Machine"\) -split ";" | Where-Object { $_ -match "node|npm" })
